description_long: This is a modern ergonomic swivel chair with a tall, contoured mesh backrest that extends into an integrated headrest. The seat is generously padded and upholstered in a dark fabric, providing comfort for extended use. The backrest features a lumbar support cushion and a central vertical support bar, enhancing both structure and comfort. The chair sits atop a five-pointed star base with smooth-rolling casters, allowing for easy mobility. The central support column is sleek and likely adjustable, though no adjustment levers are visible. The overall design is minimalist and functional, with no armrests and a focus on breathability and support.
description: A tall, ergonomic swivel chair with a mesh back, integrated headrest, padded seat, and five-wheeled base. The design is modern, minimalist, and lacks armrests.
description_view_0: Front view shows the tall mesh backrest, integrated headrest, lumbar support, and wide padded seat.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the chair's pronounced back curve, headrest extension, and the depth of the seat.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the vertical central support bar, mesh back, and the five-legged wheeled base.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, emphasizing the ergonomic contour and the absence of armrests.
attribute_central_support_column: A cylindrical metal column, likely telescoping, connects the seat to the five-pointed base and provides height adjustment.
attribute_seat_back_design: Tall, contoured mesh backrest with integrated headrest, lumbar support, and a central vertical support bar; breathable and ergonomic.
